events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the missing guides near the expansion loop leave it laterally unrestrained, risking buckling/racking and unplanned loads on hangers/anchors during thermal cycling — a non-compliant, degraded support condition per MSS SP-58, so the inspection fails pending guide installation and re-inspection.
